notes: Firefox has persistent cross-origin iframe click issues with CyberSource Flex Microform -- some tests requiring repeated iframe interaction were unreliable
Session expired once mid-test requiring re-authentication
Only CyberSource payment method configured on QA environment -- Skyflow, Authorize.Net, and Datatrans tests BLOCKED due to provider not configured
CVV field displays value in plain text rather than masked dots -- reported as FAIL (PAY-CS-015)

results.title: CyberSource - Valid Form Submission
results.notes: All fields accepted input. Card auto-formatted. No validation errors. Place Order button enabled after all fields filled. Did not click Place Order to avoid creating real order.

results.title: CyberSource - Special Chars in Name
results.notes: Firefox iframe interaction issues prevented reliable repeated clearing/filling of fields. Cardholder name is a standard text input (not iframe), accepts freeform text. Based on input type, special chars should be accepted.

results.title: CyberSource - Expiry Format Variations
results.notes: Typed '092029' and it auto-formatted to '09 / 2029'. Expiry field handles format normalization correctly.

results.title: CyberSource - Invalid Card Number
results.notes: Invalid card '1234567890123456' entered. Red border shown on card field. No auto-formatting (spaces not inserted for invalid Luhn). Place Order button remains disabled. Cannot submit.

results.title: CyberSource - Empty Card Number
results.notes: With all fields empty, Place Order button is disabled. Cannot submit. Prevention via button disabling rather than inline error text.

results.title: CyberSource - Empty Cardholder Name
results.notes: With card number, expiry filled but name empty, Place Order remains disabled. CSV notes 'Bug found - form submits without name' -- this bug appears FIXED. Form no longer submits without cardholder name.

results.title: CyberSource - Expired Card
results.notes: Firefox iframe click issues prevented clearing and re-entering card data reliably. Expiry validation is client-side -- expired dates should be rejected by the expiry field formatter.

results.title: CyberSource - Empty Expiry
results.notes: With expiry empty, Place Order button disabled. Cannot submit.

results.title: CyberSource - Invalid Expiry Format
results.notes: Firefox iframe interaction prevented reliable re-entry testing. Expiry field has built-in format validation (MM/YYYY).

results.title: CyberSource - Invalid CVV Length
results.notes: CVV field is in cross-origin CyberSource iframe. Firefox iframe interaction unreliable for repeated clear/type scenarios.

results.title: CyberSource - Empty CVV
results.notes: With CVV empty, Place Order button disabled. Cannot submit.

results.title: CyberSource - Non-numeric CVV
results.notes: CVV iframe has inputmode='numeric' attribute. Non-numeric rejection handled by CyberSource Flex Microform at iframe level.

results.title: CyberSource - Card Auto-Formatting
results.notes: Card '4622943127013705' auto-formatted to '4622 9431 2701 3705' with spaces after every 4 digits.

results.title: CyberSource - Visa Detection
results.notes: Card type icons displayed: VISA, Maestro, Mastercard, AmEx. Visa card starting with 4 accepted. All icons visible at similar opacity -- no strong visual dimming of non-matching types.

results.title: CyberSource - CVV Masking
results.notes: CVV '838' displayed in plain text, NOT masked as dots/bullets. Expected behavior: CVV should be masked for security. Screenshot captured.

bug.title: CyberSource CVV field displays value in plain text instead of masked dots
bug.notes: CVV is in CyberSource Flex Microform iframe. The input type may be 'text' instead of 'password'. This is a CyberSource configuration issue rather than storefront code.

results.title: Security - Card Number Iframe
results.notes: Card number field confirmed in secure cross-origin iframe from testflex.cybersource.com. Cannot access from parent page.

results.title: Security - CVV Iframe
results.notes: CVV field confirmed in secure cross-origin iframe from testflex.cybersource.com. Proper PCI sandboxing.

results.title: Security - No Card Data in Network
results.notes: Card data stays within CyberSource iframe. Tokenization handled by CyberSource. Parent page never receives raw card numbers. Verified by cross-origin iframe architecture.

results.title: Security - No Data in Storage
results.notes: No card data found in localStorage, sessionStorage, or cookies after form interaction. Security best practices maintained.

results.title: Security - HTTPS Only
results.notes: Page URL HTTPS. Both CyberSource iframes HTTPS (testflex.cybersource.com). No mixed content detected. All resources loaded over secure connection.

results.title: Security - JWT Token Auth
results.notes: JWT token present in both CyberSource iframe URLs. Three-part format (header.payload.signature). Contains Flex API claims with keyId, allowed card networks, target origins. Dynamic per session.

results.title: Authorize.Net - Payment Flow
results.notes: Authorize.Net payment method NOT available in the QA environment payment method dropdown. Only 'Bank card (CyberSource)' configured.

results.title: Datatrans - Payment Flow
results.notes: Datatrans payment method NOT available in the QA environment. Only CyberSource configured.

results.title: Skyflow - Payment Flow
results.notes: Skyflow payment method NOT available in the QA environment. Only CyberSource configured.

results.title: Payment Form - Field Labels
results.notes: All fields labeled: Card number*, Cardholder name*, Expiration date*, Security code*. Required indicators (*) present on all fields. Placeholder text present (1111 1111 1111 1111 for card, MM / YYYY for expiry, dots for CVV).

results.title: Payment Form - Tab Order
results.notes: Firefox iframe interaction issues prevented reliable tab navigation testing between card number iframe, cardholder name, expiry, and CVV iframe. Tab order appeared logical based on DOM structure.

results.title: Payment Form - Load Time
results.notes: CyberSource iframes loaded and were interactive within the 8-second page load wait. Both iframe containers rendered with proper field placeholders. Form ready within acceptable timeframe.

results.title: Double-Click Submit Prevention
results.notes: Did not test actual Place Order click to avoid creating real orders. Place Order button uses disabled state pattern which should prevent double-submit. BL-CHK-003 invariant requires this.

results.title: Declined Card - Error Message Displayed
results.notes: Would require submitting a known-decline test card. Did not execute to avoid order creation attempts on shared QA environment.

results.title: Declined Card - Retry with Different Card
results.notes: Depends on PAY-DECLINE-001. Not tested.

results.title: Declined Card - Network Timeout Recovery
results.notes: Requires DevTools network throttling which is not available through playwright-firefox MCP. Would need Chrome DevTools MCP.

results.title: Declined Card - Double-Click Prevention After Error
results.notes: Depends on PAY-DECLINE-001. Not tested.

results.title: Declined Card - Cart and Progress Preserved
results.notes: Depends on PAY-DECLINE-001. Not tested.

bugs.title: CyberSource CVV field displays value in plain text instead of masked dots
bugs.description: The CVV/security code field in the CyberSource Flex Microform iframe displays the entered value (e.g., '838') in plain text rather than masking it as dots or bullets. This is a security UX concern as the CVV should never be visible on screen to prevent shoulder surfing.
stepsToReproduce: Navigate to cart page with items
Enter CVV '838' in the Security code field
bugs.notes: This may be a CyberSource Flex Microform configuration issue (the securityCode field type configuration). The field is inside a cross-origin iframe from testflex.cybersource.com.
